violations.description: Ventilation hood systems - Design and construction. — --Ventilation hood system was not provided over all cooking equipment. -Stove not under vent hood.

Preventing contamination from equipment, utensils, and wiping cloths. — --In-use utensil was not properly stored during pauses in food preparation or dispensing. -Ice scoop in the large ice bin has the handle down in the ice.
Ventilation hood systems - Design and construction. — --Ventilation hood system was not provided over all cooking equipment. -No vent hood over stove top.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Food contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. -Blade on the large can opener needs cleaned. Black debris inside the ice machine.--Ventilation hood system was not cleaned properly and/or as frequently as required. -Large vent hood over the griddle needs cleaned.
Number, location, accessibility, soap and paper towels provided (3 pts deducted)
Available, knowledgeable, certified manager (4 pts deducted)
Provided as required, designed, constructed, installed, maintained, and cleaned (1 pt deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (2 pts deducted)
Provided as required, designed, constructed, installed, maintained, and cleaned (1 pt deducted)
